titles.title: Face to Face With Christ My Savior

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Face to face with Christ, my Savior, Face to face what will it be, When with rapture I behold Him, Jesus Christ Who died for me?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Face to face I shall behold Him, Far beyond the starry sky; Face to face in all His glory, I shall see Him by and by!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Only faintly now I see Him, With the darkened veil between, But a blessed day is coming, When His glory shall be seen.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: What rejoicing in His presence, When are banished grief and pain; When the crooked ways are straightened, And the dark things shall be plain.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Face to face, oh, blissful moment! Face to face to see and know; Face to face with my Redeemer, Jesus Christ Who loves me so.
